title.display: Memorial to Victims of Sexual Abuse
title.list: Memorial to Victims of Sexual Abuse

location.description: North side yof Rhawn at Ridgeway

inscription:
front:
"The light shines in the darkness, and the darkness did not overcome it." John:1-5
This light burns to honor all victims of sexual abuse by clergy and others at our parish, throughout the Archdiocese of Philadelphia, and throughout the nation.
May their light burn brightly as we protect our children and all that are vulnerable.
left:
I had to forgive a person who wasn't even sorry. That is strength.
A Survivor
right:
You are not alone. Our parish believes you. We are sorry. We stand with you.

landmark.name: Saint Cecilia Church
